/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/custom_interfaces/msg/detail/encoder_data__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/umair/ros2-esp32-mobile-robot/build/custom_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
